description: Petition to the Ayyubid sultan al-ʿĀdil regarding the capitation tax. Dating: ca. 596–615 AH, which is 1200–18 CE. The petitioner asks that his tax rate be modified from the middle rate (2 dinars), which he cannot afford to pay, to the lower rate. On verso there are some Hebrew poetical texts (possibly piyyuṭ) mentioning Iṣḥaq Khanāf (?).  (Information from Khan and CUDL)
tags: jizya, tax, jaliya, capitation tax, Petition
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
